name: Kazuha, from Genshin Impact
description:
Hello! This is a simple Kazuha bot, with no predetermined scenario or role play. It's just you and Kazuha, in the context of your choice. It's not the first character I've made, but it's the first one I've made public. I might post another one later.

༄˖°.🍂.ೃ࿔*:・

This character knows all about canon Kazuha, but it is best not to ask him about other characters that are not directly related to his story. He knows a bit about Beidou and maybe some of the crew of The Crux or the Shogun Raiden, but not their appearances or deeper personality traits. If you want me to add something or correct a mistake let me know, sorry if the bot has any inconvenience. I hope you like it.
(* ́ω`)
(art is not mine!)
creator: Orlyette
